hero.eyebrow: Wewarna Ecoprint · Est. Blitar, East Java
hero.sub: Wewarna is a slow-fashion atelier crafting one-of-one batik pieces through the ancient art of ecoprint — leaves, blossoms and roots steamed onto natural fibres until the earth itself signs the cloth.

collection.headline: The SS '26 collection
collection.side: Each piece in our seasonal edit is dyed only once — when the leaves fall, the colour is born. Browse made-to-order silhouettes or request a bespoke commission for an heirloom of your own.
collection.inquireTemplate: Halo Wewarna, I'd love to inquire about {name}.

story.headline: From the foothills of Mount Kelud, a quieter
body: Wewarna was founded in 2019 in a workshop tucked between rice fields and rambutan trees. Every garment passes through the hands of six artisans — from the leaf-gatherer who walks at dawn to the master mordanter who awakens the colour with iron-water from our own well.
There are no chemical dyes, no shortcuts, no two pieces alike. What we make is the slow record of a season, wearable.
story.quote: We do not print patterns onto cloth. We invite the cloth to remember the forest.

process.headline: How a leaf becomes
process.side: Ecoprint is a 14-day conversation between artisan, plant and fibre. Nothing is predictable; everything is intentional. Below, the four movements of our craft.

steps.title: Gather
steps.body: Leaves and blossoms are foraged at dawn from the gardens around our atelier — teak, eucalyptus, marigold, betel.

steps.title: Mordant
steps.body: Natural silk and linen are simmered in alum and iron from our well, opening the fibre to receive plant pigment.

steps.title: Bundle
steps.body: Each leaf is hand-placed across the cloth, rolled around a copper rod and bound tight with cotton twine.

steps.title: Steam & Rest
steps.body: Three hours of steam, fourteen days of rest. The pigment migrates, the print sets, the cloth becomes itself.

lookbook.headline: Lookbook SS '26
lookbook.side: Photographed at our atelier and in the gardens that grow our pigment. Scroll horizontally to browse the season's chapters.

values.headline: A house built on
values.sub: Glamour, for us, is not gloss. It is the conviction of a piece you will keep for thirty years — and then pass on.

items.title: Plant-dyed, never pigmented
items.body: Every colour you see is grown — never synthesised. The water we use returns clean to the land.

items.title: One garment, one season
items.body: We release small editions only twice a year. When a piece is gone, it is gone — like the leaves that made it.

items.title: Made by six pairs of hands
items.body: From forager to finisher, our artisans are partners — paid above the East Java living wage, with a share of every sale.

items.title: Bespoke welcome
items.body: Send us a leaf from your garden and we will weave it into a piece that is irreducibly yours.

contact.headline: Begin a piece
contact.body: Every Wewarna piece begins with a conversation. Tell us about the garment you are dreaming of — a leaf, a memory, an occasion — and our atelier will guide you through fabric, fit and finishing on WhatsApp.

whatsapp.defaultMessage: Halo Wewarna, saya ingin bertanya tentang produk Anda.
